name: compactprompt
install_doc: Academic reproduction (arXiv 2510.18043, ACM ICAIF 2025). Python pipeline + Jupyter notebook: `pip install -r requirements.txt`, run the notebook against TAT-QA/FinQA/Wikipedia/ShareGPT/arXiv datasets. NOT an agent integration — no hook/proxy/CLI.
notes: Research-paper reproduction of prompt+data compression methods: HARD PROMPT PRUNING (drop low-importance tokens, LLMLingua family), N-GRAM ABBREVIATION (codebook for frequent n-grams + legend), and numeric QUANTIZATION. Lossy SEMANTIC compression of the prompt itself — cache-breaking (rewrites the prompt) and quality-risky by design; it measures cost-vs-fidelity trade-offs. Not a coding-agent tool; offline batch analysis only.
